title: Use DMBServerHelper URL/domain helpers
description: Rule for code that composes host names, domains, or public URLs.
contextText:
Use DMBServerHelper domain and URL composition helpers when host, domain, localhost, subdomain, or HTTPS URL behavior is involved.
Document accepted input formats, localhost handling, subdomain handling, and generated HTTPS URL format for domain APIs.
Treat user-controlled URL values as security-sensitive input and keep fallback behavior explicit.
